calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Escheat Funds To The Unclaimed Property Fund Of The State Of California (Ca. Probate Code, Section 6800, Ca. Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1518)
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):
Paul Newman, Esq., former attorney for Robert Wahrhaftig, deceased Executor.

At the court's query, counsel offers testimony regarding the unfiled receipts for distribution ordered on Jul-31-2002 and notice to Beneficiary Heidi Mayer.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.
